title: ArtifactOutput
description: Lightweight output item produced by an image task. This is the immediate result returned from a provider worker before full artifact record persistence. To convert to an ArtifactRecord: set id=artifact_id, mime_type=mime, provider/model/kind/local_path from task-level context, object='artifact', and place width/height in metadata. See ARTIFACT_MAPPING.md for full field mapping table.

artifact_id.description: Local identifier for this output. Maps to ArtifactRecord.id.

url.description: URL at which this output is accessible. Maps to ArtifactRecord.url.

mime.description: MIME type of the output. Maps to ArtifactRecord.mime_type.

width.description: Pixel width. Place in ArtifactRecord.metadata.width if persisted.

height.description: Pixel height. Place in ArtifactRecord.metadata.height if persisted.

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the output file. Optional in ArtifactRecord; place in metadata.sha256 if stored.
